project.name: INTELLIGENT-CONTRACT-MANAGEMENT
project.description: ESE CLI framework for orchestrated AI ensembles + Contract Intelligence Application for construction contract compliance

nodes.name: main.py
nodes.summary: Entry point that imports and exports the FastAPI app from contract_intelligence

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: ESE package initialization with version from metadata

nodes.name: adapters.py
nodes.summary: Built-in runtime adapters for ESE role execution including dry-run, openai, local, and custom_api

nodes.name: admin.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI admin web application for system management with dashboard, pipeline, contracts, knowledge base, CRM pages

nodes.name: cli.py
nodes.summary: Typer CLI with commands for init, start, task, pr, status, report, suggestions, export, feedback, dashboard

nodes.name: config.py
nodes.summary: ESE configuration loading, validation, and helper utilities using Pydantic models

nodes.name: config_packs.py
nodes.summary: Shipped config-pack registry for opinionated ESE installations including construction-contract-intelligence pack

nodes.name: constants.py
nodes.summary: System-wide constants including execution modes, pipeline defaults, adapter defaults, certainty thresholds

nodes.name: crm.py
nodes.summary: Lightweight CRM for contract intelligence tracking entities, contacts, interactions, relationship health

nodes.name: dashboard.py
nodes.summary: Local dashboard for creating and reviewing ESE runs with job store and background execution

nodes.name: diff_context.py
nodes.summary: Helpers for building file-aware diff excerpts with truncation support

nodes.name: doctor.py
nodes.summary: ESE doctor checks for validating config and enforcing ensemble role separation constraints

nodes.name: document_ingestion.py
nodes.summary: Document ingestion pipeline with multi-format support (PDF, DOCX, XLSX, etc) and self-correction

nodes.name: feedback.py
nodes.summary: Local feedback capture and lightweight learning helpers for ESE

nodes.name: init_wizard.py
nodes.summary: Interactive wizard for creating ese.config.yaml with provider, model, role selection

nodes.name: knowledge_base.py
nodes.summary: RAG knowledge base for contract intelligence using BM25 + cosine similarity stored on disk

nodes.name: local_runtime.py
nodes.summary: Helpers for local Ollama-backed runtime including model checking and server management

nodes.name: pipeline.py
nodes.summary: ESE pipeline runner with pluggable role adapters and artifact chaining

nodes.name: pr_review.py
nodes.summary: Pull request review helpers for ESE with git/gh integration

nodes.name: provider_runtime.py
nodes.summary: Shared provider/runtime capability metadata and helpers for OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, etc

nodes.name: repo_context.py
nodes.summary: Repository-grounded context helpers for task-first ESE runs. Provides functions to collect git status, diffs, and build repository context for task execution.

nodes.name: RepoContextError
nodes.summary: Custom exception raised when repository context cannot be assembled.

nodes.summary: Collect lightweight repo context for a task-oriented run including branch, status, diff, and patch information.

nodes.name: render_repo_context

nodes.name: reports.py
nodes.summary: Helpers for loading and summarizing ESE run artifacts. Provides functions to collect run reports, render various formats (markdown, SARIF, JUnit), and manage run history.

nodes.name: RunReportError
nodes.summary: Custom exception raised when a run report cannot be loaded from artifacts.

nodes.summary: Load pipeline state from artifacts directory.

nodes.summary: Render findings as SARIF format for CI and code scanning ingestion.

nodes.name: role_drafting.py
nodes.summary: Helpers for drafting framework-mode role prompts and detecting overlap. Provides utilities for creating role prompts with keywords, warnings, and overlap detection.

nodes.name: FrameworkRoleInput
nodes.summary: Dataclass for input to framework role drafting with name and responsibility.

nodes.name: FrameworkRoleDraftReview

nodes.name: normalize_role_key
nodes.summary: Normalize role name to a consistent key format.

nodes.name: draft_framework_roles
nodes.summary: Draft framework roles from role inputs with validation and overlap detection.

nodes.summary: Choose a pragmatic default template from natural-language task scope.

nodes.summary: Build a complete task configuration from scope and template key.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Application-layer experiments and domain packs built on top of ESE.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Construction contract intelligence pilot built on top of ESE. Defines APP_KEY.

nodes.name: __main__.py
nodes.summary: CLI entry point for contract intelligence application.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: API module initialization, exports FastAPI app.

nodes.name: app.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI application for Contract Intelligence API. Provides endpoints for project analysis, commit, monitoring, and case state management.

nodes.name: analyze_project
nodes.summary: POST endpoint to analyze a construction project bid review.

nodes.name: commit_project
nodes.summary: POST endpoint to commit a contract and create obligation snapshot.

nodes.name: monitor_project
nodes.summary: POST endpoint to monitor contract obligations and emit alerts.

nodes.name: cli.py
nodes.summary: Typer CLI for Contract Intelligence pilot. Provides commands for bid-review, evaluate-corpus, build-demo, ensemble-bid-review, commit, monitor, and render-dashboard.

nodes.name: bid_review
nodes.summary: CLI command to run deterministic construction bid-review pilot.

nodes.name: evaluate_corpus_command
nodes.summary: CLI command to run gold-corpus evaluation suite.

nodes.name: build_demo_command
nodes.summary: CLI command to build sanitized demo assets and reference workspaces.

nodes.name: ensemble_bid_review
nodes.summary: CLI command to run bid review through ESE's real orchestration path.

nodes.name: commit_command
nodes.summary: CLI command to create committed contract record and obligation snapshot.

nodes.name: monitor_command
nodes.summary: CLI command to apply operational status inputs and emit alerts.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Demo module exports for build_demo_assets, DemoExportResult, and default paths.

nodes.name: exporter.py
nodes.summary: Demo asset builder. Creates sanitized demo cases from corpus, runs bid-review, commit, and monitoring lifecycle.

nodes.name: DemoCaseExport
nodes.summary: Dataclass representing an exported demo case with case_id, title, dashboard_path, recommendation, etc.

nodes.name: DemoExportResult
nodes.summary: Dataclass representing the result of demo asset building.

nodes.name: build_demo_assets
nodes.summary: Build sanitized demo assets and reference workspaces from the shipped corpus.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Shared domain models for the contract intelligence pilot.

nodes.name: enums.py
nodes.summary: Domain enumerations for Contract Intelligence including Severity, Recommendation, AnalysisPerspective, ObligationType, AlertType, etc.

nodes.name: Severity
nodes.summary: Enum for finding severity levels: LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, CRITICAL.

nodes.name: Recommendation
nodes.summary: Enum for bid review recommendations: GO, GO_WITH_CONDITIONS, NO_GO.

nodes.name: AnalysisPerspective
nodes.summary: Enum for analysis perspective: VENDOR or AGENCY.

nodes.name: ObligationType
nodes.summary: Enum for obligation types: NOTICE_DEADLINE, RECURRING_REPORTING, PRE_START_REQUIREMENT.

nodes.name: AlertType
nodes.summary: Enum for alert types: DUE, LATE.

nodes.name: DocumentType
nodes.summary: Enum for document types in construction contracts (PRIME_CONTRACT, GENERAL_CONDITIONS, INSURANCE_REQUIREMENTS, etc.).

nodes.name: models.py
nodes.summary: Pydantic domain models for Contract Intelligence including Finding, DecisionSummary, Obligation, CaseRecord, ContractCommitRecord, MonitoringRunRecord, etc.

nodes.name: Finding
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for a bid review finding with id, role, category, severity, title, summary, etc.

nodes.name: DecisionSummary
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for decision summary with recommendation, overall_risk, confidence, top_reasons, etc.

nodes.name: Obligation
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for a contract obligation with id, title, type, trigger, due_rule, owner_role, etc.

nodes.name: CaseRecord
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for overall case record with project_id, run_history, commit_history, monitoring_history.

nodes.name: BidReviewRunRecord
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for a bid review run record with artifacts, document_inventory, decision_summary, etc.

nodes.name: ContractCommitRecord
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for a contract commit record with decision_summary, finding_dispositions, obligations, etc.

nodes.name: MonitoringRunRecord
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for a monitoring run record with alerts, monitored_obligations, etc.

nodes.name: AlertRecord
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for an alert record with alert_id, obligation_id, severity, alert_type, status, etc.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Gold-corpus evaluation helpers for the contract intelligence pilot.

nodes.name: corpus.py
nodes.summary: Gold-corpus evaluation suite. Runs bid-review on corpus cases and validates outputs against expected.json.

nodes.name: CorpusEvaluationResult
nodes.summary: Dataclass for corpus evaluation result with case_id, passed, failures, artifacts_dir.

nodes.name: evaluate_corpus
nodes.summary: Run evaluation on all cases in the corpus directory.

nodes.name: evaluate_corpus_case
nodes.summary: Evaluate a single corpus case against expected outputs.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Ingestion helpers for contract intelligence pilot workflows.

nodes.name: document_classifier.py
nodes.summary: Document classifier for construction contracts. Classifies documents by type using keyword matching and language patterns.

nodes.name: classify_document
nodes.summary: Classify a document by filename and optional text content using keyword hints and language patterns.

nodes.name: missing_required_documents
nodes.summary: Check for missing required bid-review documents (PRIME_CONTRACT, GENERAL_CONDITIONS, INSURANCE_REQUIREMENTS).

nodes.name: project_loader.py
nodes.summary: Project document loader. Loads documents from project directory, extracts text from various formats (PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX), and identifies clause spans.

nodes.name: LoadedDocument
nodes.summary: Dataclass representing a loaded document with document_id, relative_path, document_type, text, clauses, etc.

nodes.name: ClauseSpan
nodes.summary: Dataclass representing a clause span with clause_id, heading, location, and text.

nodes.name: iter_project_documents
nodes.summary: Iterate and load all documents from a project directory with text extraction and clause identification.

nodes.name: extract_clause_spans
nodes.summary: Extract clause spans from document text by identifying headings and paragraphs.

nodes.name: monitoring/__init__.py
nodes.summary: Exports MonitoringResult and monitor_contract from runner module

nodes.name: MonitoringResult
nodes.summary: Dataclass containing monitoring run result: project_id, run_id, monitoring_run_path, monitoring_snapshot_path, alerts_path, alerts_count

nodes.name: _status_inputs_by_id
nodes.summary: Loads and validates MonitoringStatusInput objects from JSON file

nodes.name: _status_from_due_dates
nodes.summary: Computes status (pending/due/late/satisfied) based on due dates and last satisfied date

nodes.name: _default_status
nodes.summary: Returns default status based on obligation type for recurring_reporting, pre_start_requirement, notice_deadline

nodes.name: _monitored_obligation
nodes.summary: Converts Obligation to MonitoredObligation with status and summary

nodes.name: _alerts_for
nodes.summary: Generates AlertRecord list for obligations with due/late status

nodes.name: monitor_contract
nodes.summary: Main entry point for contract monitoring - loads obligations, computes statuses, generates alerts, persists run

nodes.name: orchestration/__init__.py
nodes.summary: Module docstring for orchestration definitions

nodes.name: FindingRule
nodes.summary: Dataclass for bid review finding rules with role, category, severity, patterns

nodes.name: BidReviewRunResult
nodes.summary: Result dataclass for bid review run with project_id, artifacts_dir, artifact_paths, decision_summary, case_record_path, run_record_path

nodes.name: LabelRule
nodes.summary: Dataclass for labeling rules (agreement_type, project_sector, payment_mechanism, procurement_method)

nodes.name: ClauseFamilyRule
nodes.summary: Dataclass for clause family detection rules

nodes.name: OutcomeEventRule
nodes.summary: Dataclass for outcome event detection rules

nodes.name: RelationshipAdvice
nodes.summary: Relationship impact assessment and negotiation strategy guidance dataclass

nodes.name: NegotiationStrategy
nodes.summary: Synthesized negotiation strategy with prioritized action items dataclass

nodes.name: compute_project_id
nodes.summary: Computes project ID from project directory name using regex normalization

nodes.name: _normalize_analysis_perspective
nodes.summary: Normalizes analysis_perspective string to AnalysisPerspective enum (vendor/agency)

nodes.name: _clause_evidence
nodes.summary: Creates EvidenceRef from document clause and regex match with excerpt context

nodes.name: _finding_text
nodes.summary: Returns title, summary, recommended_action for Finding based on perspective (vendor/agency)

nodes.name: _finding_from_rule
nodes.summary: Creates Finding from FindingRule by searching documents for pattern matches

nodes.name: _find_clause_match
nodes.summary: Finds first clause in document matching any of the patterns

nodes.name: _iter_readable_documents
nodes.summary: Filters documents by text_available and optional allowed_types

nodes.name: _first_label_match
nodes.summary: Finds first label match from rules in documents and returns matching label or default

nodes.name: _governance_artifacts_present
nodes.summary: Detects governance artifacts (amendments, change_orders, board_minutes, etc.) in documents

nodes.name: _public_text_quality
nodes.summary: Returns text quality assessment: structured_or_searchable, mixed, or portal_only_or_scanned

nodes.name: _detect_clause_families
nodes.summary: Detects clause families (gmp_offramp, appropriation_limit, etc.) from documents

nodes.name: _procurement_profile
nodes.summary: Builds ProcurementProfile from documents: agreement_type, project_sector, payment_mechanism, procurement_method, etc.

nodes.name: _context_profile
nodes.summary: Builds ContextProfile from documents: funding_flexibility, schedule_pressure, oversight_intensity, public_visibility

nodes.name: _outcome_events
nodes.summary: Extracts outcome events (award, change_order, settlement, closeout, termination, etc.) from documents

nodes.name: _outcome_status
nodes.summary: Determines outcome_status from events: termination_takeover, bankruptcy_restructuring, etc.

nodes.name: _outcome_evidence_bundle
nodes.summary: Builds OutcomeEvidenceBundle from documents and procurement_profile

nodes.name: _relationship_advisor
nodes.summary: Assesses long-term relationship impact and provides negotiation strategy guidance

nodes.name: _assess_long_term_risk
nodes.summary: Assesses long-term relationship risk based on impact score and outcome status

nodes.name: _negotiation_strategist
nodes.summary: Synthesizes all inputs into comprehensive NegotiationStrategy with priority_matrix, phase_roadmap, trade_off_analysis

nodes.name: _clause_for_match
nodes.summary: Finds clause containing the regex match position

nodes.name: _extract_obligations
nodes.summary: Extracts obligations (notice_deadline, recurring_reporting, pre_start_requirement) from contract text

nodes.name: _relationship_strategy
nodes.summary: Builds relationship strategy dict with negotiation_posture, leverage_points, sensitive_issues

nodes.name: _review_challenges
nodes.summary: Identifies contradictions and missed hazards, determines if human_review_required

nodes.name: _decision_summary
nodes.summary: Builds DecisionSummary with recommendation (go/go-with-conditions/no-go), overall_risk, confidence

nodes.name: _write_json
nodes.summary: Writes JSON payload to file with indentation

nodes.summary: Main entry point for bid review - runs analysis, generates artifacts, persists to case store

nodes.summary: Result dataclass for contract commit with project_id, commit_id, case_record_path, commit_record_path, obligations_path, obligations_count

nodes.summary: Validates list of dicts against Pydantic model

nodes.summary: Main entry point for contract commit - validates dispositions, persists contract commit record

nodes.summary: Loads current obligations from case store, optionally writes to output_path

nodes.name: _normalize_analysis_perspective
nodes.summary: Normalizes analysis_perspective string to AnalysisPerspective enum

nodes.name: _perspective_label
nodes.summary: Returns 'contractor-side' or 'agency-side' label based on perspective

nodes.name: _prompt_for_role
nodes.summary: Builds prompt for role with perspective-specific guidance and output artifact

nodes.name: _ordered_role_keys

layers.name: CLI Layer / Entry Points
layers.description: Command-line interfaces and application entry points. Typer CLI commands for ESE and Contract Intelligence, pipeline runner, and main entry point.

layers.name: Runtime/Adapter Layer
layers.description: Runtime adapters for executing roles with different LLM providers. Includes built-in adapters for OpenAI, local Ollama, custom API, and dry-run modes.

layers.name: Configuration Layer
layers.description: Configuration loading, validation, and constants. Includes Pydantic models, YAML config handling, config-pack registry, and doctor validation.

layers.name: Data/Services Layer
layers.description: Data services including knowledge base (RAG), CRM for entity management, and feedback capture for learning.

layers.name: UI/Web Layer (ESE)
layers.description: Web interfaces and dashboards for ESE framework. Includes local dashboard and FastAPI admin application.

layers.name: API Layer
layers.description: FastAPI endpoints for Contract Intelligence application. Provides REST endpoints for project analysis, commit, and monitoring.

layers.name: Orchestration Layer
layers.description: Business logic orchestration for Contract Intelligence. Bid review runner, commit runner, ESE bridge, pipeline definitions, and role catalog.

layers.name: Domain Models Layer
layers.description: Domain models and enumerations for Contract Intelligence. Pydantic models for findings, decisions, obligations, case records, etc.

layers.name: Ingestion Layer
layers.description: Document ingestion and loading for Contract Intelligence. Includes document classifier and project document loader.

layers.name: Monitoring Layer
layers.description: Contract monitoring and alerting. Monitors contract obligations and emits alerts for due/late status.

layers.name: Storage Layer
layers.description: Filesystem-based case storage for Contract Intelligence. Persists case records, commit records, and monitoring state.

layers.name: UI Layer (Contract Intelligence)
layers.description: Dashboard rendering for Contract Intelligence projects. Renders project dashboard as JSON with findings, timeline, and severity counts.

layers.name: Evaluation Layer
layers.description: Gold-corpus evaluation suite for Contract Intelligence. Validates bid-review outputs against expected results.

layers.name: Demo Layer
layers.description: Demo asset builder for Contract Intelligence. Creates sanitized demo cases from corpus for demonstration purposes.

layers.name: Utilities Layer
layers.description: Helper utilities including diff context, repository context, reports, role drafting, templates, init wizard, PR review, and document ingestion.

layers.name: Test Layer
layers.description: Test files for the project covering adapters, CLI, configuration, API, bid review, commit lifecycle, demo, ESE bridge, ingestion, monitoring, UI, pipeline, templates, role drafting, doctor, E2E, and PR review.

tour.title: Entry Points and CLI Layer
tour.description: Start by exploring the main entry points. main.py is the FastAPI entry point for the web service. ese/cli.py provides the Typer CLI for ESE framework commands (init, start, task, pr, status). apps/contract_intelligence/__main__.py and cli.py are the CLI entry points for the Contract Intelligence application.

tour.title: Configuration and Validation
tour.description: ESE uses Pydantic models for configuration. Explore config.py for the main ESEConfig, ProviderConfig, RoleConfig classes. Check config_packs.py for the registry of shipped config packs (including construction-contract-intelligence). The doctor.py module validates config and enforces role separation constraints.

tour.title: Runtime Adapters
tour.description: ESE supports multiple runtime adapters for executing AI roles. adapters.py contains built-in adapters: dry_run_adapter (no external calls), openai_adapter (OpenAI API), local_adapter (Ollama), and custom_api_adapter. provider_runtime.py provides capability metadata for different LLM providers.

tour.title: Contract Intelligence Domain Models
tour.description: The Contract Intelligence application is built on domain models. Explore enums.py for Severity, Recommendation, ObligationType, AlertType, DocumentType. Check models.py for Pydantic models: Finding, DecisionSummary, Obligation, CaseRecord, BidReviewRunRecord, ContractCommitRecord, MonitoringRunRecord, AlertRecord.

tour.title: Orchestration Layer
tour.description: The orchestration layer coordinates the Contract Intelligence workflows. bid_review_runner.py runs bid reviews. commit_runner.py handles contract committing and obligation snapshots. ese_bridge.py connects to ESE for ensemble AI execution. pipeline.py defines the workflow stages.

tour.title: Ingestion and Storage
tour.description: Document ingestion loads and processes construction contract documents. project_loader.py loads project documents and extracts clause spans. document_classifier.py classifies documents by type. Storage layer persists case records, commits, and monitoring state to disk via filesystem.py.

tour.title: Monitoring and Alerts
tour.description: The monitoring layer tracks contract obligations and emits alerts. monitoring/runner.py monitors committed contracts and checks obligation due dates. It generates alerts for due and late obligations based on AlertType enum (DUE, LATE).

tour.title: Knowledge Base and Data Services
tour.description: ESE provides data services for contract intelligence. knowledge_base.py implements a RAG system using BM25 + cosine similarity for contract knowledge. crm.py provides lightweight CRM for tracking entities, contacts, and interactions. feedback.py captures user feedback for learning.

tour.title: API and UI Layers
tour.description: The application exposes REST APIs and dashboards. api/app.py provides FastAPI endpoints: analyze_project (POST), commit_project (POST), monitor_project (POST). The UI layer renders project dashboards with findings, timeline, and severity counts via ui/dashboard.py. ESE also has a dashboard and admin web interfaces.
